title: Primus Weekly Engineering Report — 2026-W21
key_findings: 1 PR merged to main in the 2026-W21 window (Bug Fix: 1). No backend pin or Turbo pin changed in this window; the current Primus-Turbo pin landed in PR #723 on 2026-05-15 (W20).

PR #721 hardens the Slurm launcher: runner/primus-cli-slurm-entry.sh resolves SLURM_MASTER_ADDR via scontrol show hostnames "$SLURM_NODELIST" up front, uses it as MASTER_ADDR when unset (replacing the prior `head -n1 || echo localhost` fallback), and exits 2 with explicit error logs when a user-provided MASTER_ADDR does not match the first SLURM host — preventing distributed Slurm jobs from hanging due to mismatched Slurm node-rank mapping.

No weekly report was generated for 2026-W20; the W21 report covers only Mon 2026-05-18 → Fri 2026-05-22 GMT+8. PRs merged between 2026-05-11 and 2026-05-17 (notably #723's Primus-Turbo pin advance, #722 unify enable_primus_turbo flag, #715 AINIC v26.2 a-77 bundle, and others) are visible in git log origin/main but fall outside the W21 PR-table window and are summarized only in the Highlights sections.

Megatron-LM upstream drift: pin d3528a21 (2026-03-06) is now 554 commits behind upstream HEAD e27607a8 (2026-05-22), +96 since W19. Highlights since W19: `fully remove legacy code` (#4759), TE 2.15.0 dependency bump (#4682), `[Main] Support A2A Overlap for Megatron-FSDP` (#3797), `M-FSDP` MXFP8 fine_grained_param_gather toggle (#4181), HybridModel recompute (#4496), mamba-builder migration (#4550), MTP recompute crash fix on packed sequences (#4593), CUDA graph API refactor (#4292), GEMM+SwiGLU fused MLP roll-up (#4636), high-priority A2A stream + HybridEP preprocessing SMs (#4694), MoE GroupedExperts EP-aware memory estimation (#4687). Recommendation: plan sync (unchanged).

torchtitan upstream drift: pin 5fb7cc2e (2025-10-15) is now 667 commits behind upstream HEAD b5852826 (2026-05-21), +57 since W19. Highlights since W19: DeepEP import fix (#3414), split DeepEP/HybridEP dispatchers (#3389), clean DTensor boundaries for shared/routed experts (#3386), GraphTrainer rework of full_inductor_compilation_pass via regional_inductor + CPU-attr migration (#3346), `[graph_trainer] AutoParallel AOT FX Trace Integration` (#2725), `[GraphTrainer] Add Context Parallel support` (#3305), `[Full DTensor] Config-based Full DTensor for Llama3` (#3159), `ChunkedCELoss torch.autograd.grad` (#3249), `[LoRA] Add LoRA converter` (#3264), `[rl] switch to vllm v2 engine` (#3330). Recommendation: urgent sync (unchanged).

Primus-Turbo monthly drift (May): CI/benchmark pin is now 06b8d3fe (Primus-Turbo #278, HYBRID FP8 grouped GEMM for Triton, 2026-05-13), +39 commits ahead of month-start CI pin 333b68d7 and +44 commits ahead of month-start benchmark pin a4488f6c. Pin moved in TWO PRs this month: PR #694 (W19) bumped 333b68d7→ef5b58ea (+32); PR #723 (W20) bumped ef5b58ea→06b8d3fe (+7 more). AITER pin moved e83f9903→857f4d15 (W19) →b5e03ed191 (W20). TRITON_COMMIT 88b227e is unchanged since W19. Recommendation: monitor.

No backend-gap report was regenerated this week: no submodule SHA changed (Megatron-LM, torchtitan, Megatron-Bridge, Emerging-Optimizers, HummingbirdXT, maxtext are all unchanged on origin/main); no PRIMUS_TURBO_* / AITER / TRITON / ROCSHMEM / UCCL pin changed in the W21 window; Primus-Turbo is also not currently surfaced as a separate backend under docs/backend-gap/, so the existing torchtitan baseline report (5fb7cc2e vs upstream main) is unaffected.
